CustomField.description: When checked, this individual validation rule is completely skipped during trigger execution. Unlike permission-based bypasses, this is an unconditional kill switch that applies to all users regardless of permissions or context.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check to disable this validation rule for all users. Use as a kill switch during troubleshooting or data migrations. Uncheck to re-enable.
CustomField.label: Bypass Execution
